ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital or central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital or central point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country's data was last updated */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "healthcare_system" TEXT /* A brief description of the healthcare system */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* The percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "lockdown_status" TEXT /* The current lockdown status */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* A contact number for the health department */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official health department website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the report pertains to */,
  "scrap_time" TEXT /* Time the data was scraped */,
  "update_time_gmt" TEXT /* Time the data was last updated in GMT */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_cases" TEXT /* Total number of cases in the country */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" TEXT /* Total number of deaths in the country */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported */,
  "total_recovered" TEXT /* Total number of recovered cases in the country */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" TEXT /* Total number of active cases in the country */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million population */,
  "total_tests" TEXT /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests per million population */,
  "vaccinations_per_million" REAL /* Number of vaccinations per million population */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests among all tests conducted */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Test positivity rate over the last 7 days */,
  "icu_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients in intensive care units */,
  "icu_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ICU patients per million population */,
  "ventilator_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients on ventilators */,
  "ventilator_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ventilator patients per million population */,
  "new_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations reported */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted */,
  "new_tests_smoothed" INTEGER /* Smoothed number of new tests conducted over the last 7 days */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_scraped" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last scraped from this source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data collection */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required for data collection */,
  "last_successful_scrape" TEXT /* Date and time of the last successful scrape */,
  "last_failed_scrape" TEXT /* Date and time of the last failed scrape */,
  "scrape_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the source is scraped (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data was collected for */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "scrap_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was scraped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or error details */,
  "scrape_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data collection process */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data collected (in bytes) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the user is from */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user based on IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the metadata pertains to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., language, currency) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  "vaccination_program" TEXT /* Details of the vaccination program */,
  "travel_restrictions" TEXT /* Current travel restrictions in place */,
  "covid_app" TEXT /* URL or description of the national COVID-19 app */,
  "emergency_services" TEXT /* Contact information for emergency services */,
  "health_tips" TEXT /* Health tips and guidelines provided by the government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metadata_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregated report */,
  "total_cases" TEXT /* Total number of cases in the country */,
  "total_deaths" TEXT /* Total number of deaths in the country */,
  "total_recovered" TEXT /* Total number of recovered cases in the country */,
  "active_cases" TEXT /* Total number of active cases in the country */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million population */,
  "total_tests" TEXT /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests per million population */,
  "vaccinations_per_million" REAL /* Number of vaccinations per million population */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests among all tests conducted */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Test positivity rate over the last 7 days */,
  "icu_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients in intensive care units */,
  "icu_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ICU patients per million population */,
  "ventilator_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients on ventilators */,
  "ventilator_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ventilator patients per million population */,
  "new_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations reported */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted */,
  "new_tests_smoothed" INTEGER /* Smoothed number of new tests conducted over the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "total_cases" TEXT /* Total number of cases in the country */,
  "total_deaths" TEXT /* Total number of deaths in the country */,
  "total_recovered" TEXT /* Total number of recovered cases in the country */,
  "active_cases" TEXT /* Total number of active cases in the country */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases */,
  "cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of cases per million population */,
  "deaths_per_million" REAL /* Number of deaths per million population */,
  "total_tests" TEXT /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests per million population */,
  "vaccinations_per_million" REAL /* Number of vaccinations per million population */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests among all tests conducted */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Test positivity rate over the last 7 days */,
  "icu_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients in intensive care units */,
  "icu_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ICU patients per million population */,
  "ventilator_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients on ventilators */,
  "ventilator_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ventilator patients per million population */,
  "new_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations reported */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted */,
  "new_tests_smoothed" INTEGER /* Smoothed number of new tests conducted over the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
